summary: Iteration 18 - Testing of 4 new OEC Tech Institute LMS features: Staff Management, Student IDs, PDF Download, Profile Photo Upload. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified via Playwright automation.

minor.issue: Old admission forms in database don't have profile_pic_url field (expected - field added in new schema but old data doesn't have it)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/staff/categories returns 8 categories (Principal, Admin, Instructor, Job Holder, Internship with Stipend, Internship without Stipend, Sweeper, Guard)
Backend: GET /api/admin/staff returns staff list
Backend: POST /api/admin/staff creates staff with all fields (name, category, phone, email, cnic, salary, file URLs)
Backend: POST /api/admin/staff validates required fields (name, category)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/staff/{id} deletes staff
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/staff/{id} returns 404 for non-existent staff
Backend: Staff endpoints require admin authentication
Backend: GET /api/admin/admission-forms returns forms with student_id field (OEC-YYYY-XXXX format)
Backend: Admission forms endpoint requires admin auth
Backend: POST /api/upload requires admin auth
Backend: POST /api/student/upload requires auth
Backend: Homepage load time under 2 seconds
Backend: API response times under 2 seconds
Frontend: Admin sidebar has Staff link
Frontend: Admin Staff page loads with data-testid='admin-staff-page'
Frontend: Admin Staff page shows 8 category filters + All (9 total buttons)
Frontend: Admin Staff page has Add Staff button
Frontend: Staff form modal has Profile Photo upload field (data-testid='staff-profile-pic')
Frontend: Staff form modal has ID Card Front upload field (data-testid='staff-id-front')
Frontend: Staff form modal has ID Card Back upload field (data-testid='staff-id-back')
Frontend: Staff form modal has Letter upload field (data-testid='staff-letter')
Frontend: Staff form has name input and category select
Frontend: Staff form has Save Staff button
Frontend: Existing staff member (Ali Khan - Instructor) displayed correctly
Frontend: Admin Admissions page shows 3 admission forms
Frontend: Admin Admissions page shows Student IDs as gold badges (OEC-2026-0001, OEC-2026-0002, OEC-2026-0003)
Frontend: Admin Admissions page has Download PDF button on each form
Frontend: Admin Admissions page has search by name/ID input
Code Review: Checkout Step 2 has Profile Photo upload field (data-testid='doc-profile')
Code Review: Checkout _docsNext function uploads profile photo to /student/upload endpoint
Code Review: Profile photo URL stored in form.profile_pic_url and submitted with admission form
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing staff member (Ali Khan) and admission forms
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified all 4 new features: 1) Staff Management - CRUD operations working, 8 categories, file uploads for profile/ID/letter, 2) Student IDs - OEC-YYYY-XXXX format displayed as gold badges in admin admissions, 3) PDF Download - button present on each admission form, opens printable preview, 4) Profile Photo Upload - field present in checkout Step 2, uploads to /student/upload endpoint. Note: Checkout page requires Google OAuth login to test fully. Email notifications remain MOCKED.

mocked_apis_list: Email sending mocked (logs to console instead of sending real emails)

staff_management.categories: 8 categories: Principal, Admin, Instructor, Job Holder, Internship with Stipend, Internship without Stipend, Sweeper, Guard
staff_management.file_uploads: Profile Photo, ID Card Front, ID Card Back, Letter (PDF/Word/Excel/Image)
staff_management.ui_elements: Sidebar link, category filters, Add Staff button, form modal with all fields

student_ids.display: Gold badges in admin admissions page

pdf_download.button: Download PDF button on each admission form
pdf_download.functionality: Opens new window with printable admission form
